title: Esmyx's money
body:
Add a money system to minecraft

commands :
no op :

/balance => view your money                                                                       
/pay [player] [amount] => pay the player                                                                   
/withdraw [amount] => withdraw the amount to item                                                                       
/deposit => deposit the amount contained in your main hand                                                          
/helpy => send help message                                                                                   
 
op :
 
/admin-view [player] => view the balance of the player                                                                                          
/admin-set [player] [amount] => set the money of the player                                                                             
/admin-add [player] [amount] => add the amount to the balance of the player
